summary: Completed frontend testing of logo update, hero section removal, and UI improvements. All requested features are working correctly.

issues: Admin panel sidebar shows role name (Super Admin/Мод P2P) instead of logo - this is by design for admin panels

Hero section successfully removed from Landing page - offers table now shows directly
Trader balance page improved with urgent actions block and quick action cards
All navigation works correctly in Trader Dashboard (offers, sales, purchases, history)
Admin/Mod chat hub shows improved placeholder with category quick actions (P2P Споры, Мерчанты, Магазин, Тех. поддержка)
Russian placeholders working correctly: 'Введите логин' and 'Введите пароль'
